evidence.title: US trademark opposition
evidence.snippet: A Shenzhen electronics brand plans to sell smart speakers in the US under the mark EchoNova. A prior US registration EchoNova Labs exists in class 9.

evidence.title: FRAND and SEP risk in EU
evidence.snippet: A 5G IoT module exporter enters Germany and France without SEP licensing from major pools.

evidence.title: Software localization copyright
evidence.snippet: A game studio outsourced Japanese translation and later reused text in another title without explicit assignment.

evidence.title: Employee mobility leakage
evidence.snippet: US subsidiary hired competitors' engineers and imported source snippets from prior employer repositories.
